struction runs a Apache WEB server for class and student WEB sites at http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu (secure SSL site) This server runs on a UNIX (Solaris X86) computer. WEB pages are read from the

is X86) computer. WEB pages are read from the home directories of the users' Instructional UNIX accounts. Features of this server are described under http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/setup.html WEB Servers for Specific Classes ----------

html WEB Servers for Specific Classes -------------------------------- WEB servers are also provided for specific classes when needed. These have included pentagon.cs.berkeley.edu for CS184 (Apache on UNIX) rhombus.cs.berkeley.ed
